title: ca-pi-codeql job not required by the ci-passed merge-readiness gate
evidence: The `ca-pi-codeql` job (lines 359-393) runs `github/codeql-action/analyze` with `security-extended` queries over `plugins/ca-pi/tools/src` and `plugins/ca-pi/extensions`, then fails on unresolved high-severity findings via `test_pi_security.py --sarif`. But `ci-passed` (lines 829-867) lists `needs:` for 18 other jobs (changes, host-descriptors, ci-impact, tools, ca-sandbox-tools, ca-pi-tools, ca-pi-latest, hooks, version-bump*, prose*, badge-consistency, manifests, license-consistency, surface) and builds `required_results` from all of them plus a separate `canary_result` for `ca-pi-latest` only — `ca-pi-codeql` appears in neither `needs:` nor `required_results`. A workflow-level dependency is the only mechanism this file uses to force a job to complete before ci-passed evaluates; without it, ci-passed does not wait for ca-pi-codeql at all, so its result (pass, fail, or still-running) has no bearing on the gate.
impact: If ca-pi-codeql fails (finds a high-severity security-extended issue) or is still running when ci-passed evaluates, ci-passed can still report success/skip for every job it does track and pass. If branch protection on main is configured to require only `ci-passed` (the repo's other per-plugin CodeQL/security gates are wired this way for consistency), a PR touching plugins/ca-pi/** with an unresolved CodeQL security-extended finding can merge to main undetected by the merge gate.
recommendation: Add `ca-pi-codeql` to `ci-passed`'s `needs:` list and fold its result into `required_results` (it should be required, not advisory, since it fails on the same 'if ca-pi changed' condition as ca-pi-tools) — mirroring how ca-pi-tools/hooks/etc. are wired, not how the explicitly advisory ca-pi-latest canary is wired.
acceptance_criteria: ci.yml's ci-passed job lists ca-pi-codeql in its `needs:`
ca-pi-codeql's result is included in required_results (not treated as advisory like ca-pi-latest)
A PR that changes plugins/ca-pi/** and fails ca-pi-codeql causes ci-passed to fail
